violations.description: Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooked potentially hazardous food was not cooled properly from 140F to 70F or below within two hours. -Crock pots in the refrigerator still at 44 degrees from the night before.--Cooked potentially hazardous food was not cooled properly from 70F to 41F or below within four hours.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Ice buildup in the walk in freezer is covering food boxes.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Drain on handwash sink leaks into a bucket.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor areas under fryers and equipment need cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
